dashboard.title: Gears Docs Translation Status
dashboard.description: Translation progress for the Gears documentation. `ru` is wired up as an example target locale so the dashboard renders; add real locales in astro.config.mjs and here, then translate files under src/content/docs/<lang>/.

ui.statusByLocale.heading: Translation progress by locale
ui.statusByLocale.completeLocalization: This translation is complete, amazing job! 🎉
